title: The Killer Robots and the Battle for the Cosmic Potato
original_title: The Killer Robots and the Battle for the Cosmic Potato
overview: After escaping from an asteroid prison, a band of robotic mercenaries are recruited by alien plant-people to help find the Cosmic Potato of Power.
